zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny於1444年出生在英國英格蘭艾可布萊崔時，她的父親Hugh Fenn27歲，母親Eleanor23歲。她於1471年5月1日之前與Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny在英國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1485年9月28日在英國威爾斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年41歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 巴沙洛繆 馮 格亞特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny于1444年出生在英国英格兰艾可布萊崔时，她的父亲Hugh Fenn27岁，母亲Eleanor23岁。她于1471年5月1日之前与Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny在英国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1485年9月28日在英国威尔斯蒙姆爾阿加文尼享年41岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 巴沙洛繆 馮 格亞特。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

nameMeanings.name: Fenne,
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: 19th‐century coinage, from the name of the plant (Latin faeniculum, a diminutive of faenum ‘hay’), whose seeds are used as a spice. This probably came to be used as a first name because of its resemblance to a short form of Fenella .

nameMeanings.name: Baroness
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Norwegian: old variant of Bartnes (and, in North America, probably also an altered form of this), a habitational name from Trøndelag, a form of Old Norse burkn ‘fern’ + nes ‘promontary, headland’.
In some cases possibly also an altered form of German   Bartmess  .

variants.name: Bartmess
meanings: American shortened form of German   Barthelmess  .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny was born in 1444, in Braintree, Essex, England, United Kingdom, her father, Hugh Fenn, was 27 and her mother, Eleanor, was 23. She married Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny before 1 May 1471, in England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 28 September 1485, in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom, at the age of 41, and was buried in London St Bartholomew the Great, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny est née en 1444, à Braintree, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Hugh Fenn, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Eleanor, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny avant 1 mai 1471, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 septembre 1485, à Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Bartholomew the Great, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny 1444 in Braintree, Essex, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugh Fenn 27 und ihre Mutter Eleanor 23. Sie hat vor 1. Mai 1471 in England Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 28. September 1485 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Wales, United Kingdom und wurde in London St Bartholomew the Great, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny è nata il nel 1444 nel Braintree, Essex, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Hugh Fenn, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Eleanor, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny prima del 1 maggio 1471, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 28 settembre 1485, nel Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Galles, Regno Unito, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a London St Bartholomew the Great, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavennyが1444年にイギリスイギリスエセックスブレイントレで生まれた時，父Hugh Fennは27歳，母Eleanorは23歳であった。1471年5月1日以前にイギリスでSir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavennyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1485年9月28日にイギリスウェールズモンモウスシュアイアアバーガベニーで41歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト バーソロメウ ス グレアトにて埋葬された。

ko.London St Bartholomew the Great, Middles: 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 그리트
ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny(이)가 1444년 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 브레이트리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Fenn(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Eleanor(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1471년 5월 1일 이전 영국에서 Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1485년 9월 28일 영국 웨일스 몬모우스실르 압르가븐이에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 바토롬w 테 그리트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny nasceu em 1444, em Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Fenn, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny antes 1 de maio de 1471, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1485, em Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, United Kingdom, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em London St Bartholomew the Great, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.London St Bartholomew the Great, Middles: лондон ст бартоломю т грит, миддлесекс, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny родилась в 1444 г. в местности бреинтри, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Hugh Fenn было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny перед 1 май 1471 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 28 сентября 1485 г. в местности абиргавенни, монмоутшир, Уэльс, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности лондон ст бартоломю т грит, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Fenne, Baroness Abergavenny nació en 1444, en Braintree, Essex, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Hugh Fenn, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Eleanor, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Sir George Neville 5th and de jure 3rd Baron Bergavenny antes de 1 de mayo de 1471, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1485, en Abergavenny, Monmouthshire, Gales, Reino Unido, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en London St Bartholomew the Great, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
